testcase.name: test_login_success
test_daily_report_today
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_sales_marketplace_customer.py:68: in test_daily_report_today assert response.status_code == 200, f"Daily report failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Daily report failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_daily_report_with_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_sales_marketplace_customer.py:94: in test_daily_report_with_data assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_daily_report_invalid_date
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_sales_marketplace_customer.py:110: in test_daily_report_invalid_date assert response.status_code == 400 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_linked_listings
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_sales_marketplace_customer.py:140: in test_get_linked_listings assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get linked listings failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get linked listings failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_available_listings
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_sales_marketplace_customer.py:154: in test_get_available_listings assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get available listings failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get available listings failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_customer_options_with_auth
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_sales_marketplace_customer.py:196: in test_get_customer_options_with_auth assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get customer options failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get customer options failed: {"detail":"Page not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_add_location
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_sales_marketplace_customer.py:270: in test_add_location assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Add location failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Add location failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_pos_transactions
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_daily_sales_marketplace_customer.py:322: in test_get_pos_transactions assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get transactions failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get transactions failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
